subject: [MULTICLOUD] Release to fix cve issues
commit_message:
[MULTICLOUD] Release to fix cve issues

This release focus on fixing cve issues by upgrading dependencies
with regarding to artifactbroker, framework, openstack components.

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1344
Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1408

Signed-off-by: Bin Yang <bin.yang@windriver.com>
Change-Id: I4568a6c0039d111327d13ed35017b66b04e83ff1

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 4:

gate errors
- 2 usual HC tests failing (Holmes and OOF)
- basic_cnf: "requestStatus":{"requestState":"FAILED","statusMessage":"STATUS: Error Source: OPENSTACK, Error Message: Exception occured during vnf adapter: Resource basic_cnf-d486c206-5f74-4f59-a1ca-e8de7c6a9a20 already exists in owner/cloud/tenant basicnf-owner/k8sregion/4083c7077a8d4038a72482bdf091f34e with ID . FLOW STATUS: All Rollback flows have completed successfully RETRY STATUS: Retries have been exhausted. ROLLBACK STATUS: Rollback has been completed successfully.","percentProgress":100,"timestamp":"Fri, 24 Sep 2021 19:27:15 GMT"}}} 

first time I see this kind of error.
basic_cnf is using multicloud plugin but is probably not the most reliable test case even it is reasonably good in Daily at the moment
pnf-macro (also using multicloud plugin) is OK

multicloud pod are udpated https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//124124-4/k8s/k8s/kubernetes-status/versions.html
most of the tests needed regarding the patch (versions/tern) are not executed in gating as it would take too long but during in the weekly chain

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

it seems we have an issue with pike: https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//124124-4/k8s/k8s/kubernetes-status/pod-onap-multicloud-pike-554d9dcd4b-rlxhl-multicloud-pike-logs.html
